_doc: (C4) Central breakpoint registry. Phone-first; tablet and desktop are progressive enhancements. Use these tokens, not raw px, in every @media query and platform conditional. The mobile app collapses to phone widths regardless of viewport; the web surface uses the full ladder.

sm.doc: Type-scale tightens below this — handsets in portrait.

_usage._doc: CSS custom properties surface as --bp-sm…--bp-2xl. JS surfaces as window.PS_THEME.bp.{sm,md,lg,xl,2xl}. Use min-width for desktop-up enhancements; use max-width only for phone-down compaction (sm).
